title_cn: 参议员阿姆斯特朗倡导扩大能源基础设施

Armstrong joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the need for US infrastructure to meet the growing energy demand of AI data centers.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 战争爆发100天后，美国与伊朗似乎距离达成和平协议还很远
summary: The US and Iran appear to be making little progress toward an interim deal to end the war Washington and Israel began 100 days ago, as fresh attacks pile pressure on a fragile ceasefire.

title_cn: 众议员斯托布讨论对代理国家情报总监的担忧

Republican Congressman Greg Steube joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss his opinion on Pulte's appointment. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: United Airlines CEO Discusses Industry Challenges
title_cn: 联合航空首席执行官讨论行业挑战
summary: At The International Air Transport Association in Rio De Janeiro, United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby discussed with Co-host of Bloomberg Surveillance Lisa Abramowicz the current challenges facing the airline industry including rising fuel costs and their impact on ticket pricing. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Can a Forgotten Caribbean Town Become a Spaceport?
title_cn: 一个被遗忘的加勒比小镇可以成为太空港吗？
summary: The Dominican Republic’s plan to build a commercial spaceport in the small town of Oviedo is about far more than rockets. Launch on Demand founder Burton Catledge says the project could create thousands of jobs, attract new investment, and help diversify the country beyond tourism. Supporters envision a new hub for aerospace, technology, and education, while local residents hope the project can bring opportunities to a region that has long felt overlooked. But before launches begin, developers must build the infrastructure, workforce, and regulatory framework needed to support an entirely new industry. For many in Oviedo, the spaceport represents a chance to put their town, and perhaps the country itself, on the map.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Air France-KLM CEO Discusses Resuming Gulf Flights
title_cn: 法航-荷航首席执行官讨论恢复海湾航班
summary: Air France-KLM CEO Benjamin Smith discussed the airline's cautious approach to resuming flights in the Gulf region, confirming the return to Riyadh while other destinations like Dubai, Tel Aviv, and Beirut remain closed.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 人们越来越担心对冲基金拥挤可能会放大危机风险
summary: Friday’s sudden equities rout after a months-long rally is renewing concerns that the unwinding of crowded trades could exacerbate market losses.

title: GE Sees Potential For More China Deals After Trump-Xi Meeting
title_cn: 特习会后，通用电气看到了更多中国交易的潜力
summary: GE Aerospace remains optimistic that it can secure more aircraft-engine orders from China after President Donald Trump and his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping met in Beijing last month and manufacturing partner Boeing Co. came home an initial batch of commitments.

title: FIFA World Cup Set to Be Most Lucrative Cup Amid US Hosting Concerns
title_cn: 由于美国主办方的担忧，国际足联世界杯将成为最赚钱的世界杯
summary: The upcoming FIFA World Cup, hosted across North America, is projected to generate a record $11 billion in revenue. However, there are some questions on the actual benefits for the United States playing host. Bloomberg Business of Sports Columnist Adam Minter came on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss what hosting such an event means for the host country.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Air France-KLM CEO on Fuel Prices and Gulf Flights
title_cn: 法航-荷航首席执行官谈燃油价格和海湾航班
summary: Air France-KLM CEO Ben Smith speaks at the International Air Transport Association (IATA) saying "we'll make do" with the availability of fuel and the that he expects 5-10% of customers to return, when flights through the Gulf return to full capacity. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX IPO: What You Need to Know
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股：您需要了解的信息
summary: Ahead of SpaceX's highly anticipated IPO Co-host of Bloomberg Tech Ed Ludlow, Bloomberg New's Senior Equities reporter Bailey Lipschultz, and Bloomberg's Senior Aerospace Defense and Airline analyst George Ferguson join David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss market expectations and the potential impact on the industry. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Knicks Lead The Spurs 2-0
title_cn: 尼克斯2-0领先马刺
summary: The NBA Finals features two of the most marketable teams in the league. On one side of the finals matchup, the New York Knicks have their ties to NYC, the iconic MSG, and their legacy as one of the original NBA franchises. The other side of the court, the San Antonio Spurs are led by 22 year-old French superstar Victor Wembanyama a 7'4 player considered to be the future of the league. Host of Sports City and Co-host of Bloomberg's Business of Sports podcast Randall Williams joins Bloomberg This Weekend hosts David Gura and Christina Ruffini to discuss how the broader NBA landscape could benefit from the competitive series. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI’s Mega Stock Deals Raise Specter of More Shares Than Buyers
title_cn: AI 的大型股票交易引发了人们对股票数量超过买家的担忧
summary: A flood of new shares from companies looking to fund their artificial intelligence ambitions is raising questions on Wall Street about whether there will be enough buyers to soak them all up and what this pile of fresh equity will mean for stock prices more broadly.

title: EM Long Bonds Seen Missing Out on Any Iran Peace Dividend
title_cn: 新兴市场长期债券被视为错失伊朗和平红利
summary: Emerging-market bond investors expecting a broad rally from any US-Iran peace deal may be in for a disappointment, as money managers see sticky inflation and fiscal concerns keeping long-term yields elevated.

title: OPEC+, Aviations Execs Address Iran War Impact at Duel Conferences
title_cn: OPEC+、航空业高管在决斗会议上讨论伊朗战争影响
summary: The seven countries of OPEC+ hold their monthly meeting while airline executives gather for their annual conference, both covering the impact of the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. Co-Host of Bloomberg Surveillance Lisa Abramowicz and Bloomberg News Middle East Correspondent Abeer Abu Omar join David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the information that has come from these two events. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Is the Caribbean the Next Space Race Battleground?
title_cn: 加勒比海是下一个太空竞赛战场吗？
summary: The rapid growth of satellite networks is creating a global race to build the infrastructure needed to get them into orbit. Launch on Demand founder Burton Catledge is developing what could become the first US-owned commercial spaceport in Latin America, betting that demand for launch capacity will surge as the number of satellites in orbit expands dramatically over the coming decade. McKinsey aerospace expert Ryan Burkardt says existing launch infrastructure is already strained. CSIS aerospace specialist Kari Bingen sees more than just demand driving the opportunity: space could become a new frontier of geopolitical competition as China expands its footprint across Latin America.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Israel’s Central Bank Intervened in FX Trade to Curb Shekel
title_cn: 以色列央行干预外汇交易以遏制谢克尔
summary: The Bank of Israel intervened in the foreign exchange market in May, purchasing $801 million as the shekel reached the strongest level in over three decades.

title: US-China Rivalry Is Laid Bare by a Contract to Deepen an Argentine River
title_cn: 加深阿根廷河流的合同暴露了中美竞争
summary: A government tender in Argentina underscored tensions between Washington and Beijing in Latin America as President Javier Milei’s administration awarded a 25-year contract to upgrade a key trade artery to a venture with a history of ties to China.

title: ECB Steps Up as G7’s Lead Hawk With Interest-Rate Hike Primed
title_cn: 欧洲央行成为七国集团的领头鹰，准备加息
summary: A euro-zone interest-rate hike in the coming week is set to place the European Central Bank at the vanguard of global tightening caused by the Iran war.

summary: Malaysia’s national petroleum company Petroliam Nasional Bhd is seeking access to a major gas field in Turkmenistan, Bernama reported, citing Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim.

title_cn: 据《金融时报》报道，OpenAI 已准备好在计划的 IPO 之前转向“超级应用”
summary: OpenAI is readying a major platform overhaul ahead of its highly anticipated IPO later this year to better compete with rivals such as Anthropic, the Financial Times reported.

title: South Korea Unveils Measures to Stem Won Slide, Curb Speculation
title_cn: 韩国推出阻止韩元下滑、抑制投机的措施
summary: South Korea laid out a series of targeted measures to curb pressure on the won after the currency slid to its weakest level since 2009, pledging firm action against speculative trading and other activities that authorities said had amplified recent market swings.

title: Partners Co-Founder Gantner Blames Short-Seller for Share Slump
title_cn: Partners联合创始人甘特纳将股价暴跌归咎于卖空者
summary: Partners Group Holding AG co-founder Alfred Gantner said the firm’s recent share-price decline was a “massive overreaction” and blamed unfounded attacks by short-seller Grizzly Research.

title: Fire Erupts on Luxury Yacht Near Singapore's Sentosa Cove
title_cn: 新加坡圣淘沙湾附近的豪华游艇发生火灾
summary: Firefighters attempt to extinguish a fire that broke out on a luxury yacht berthed in Singapore's Sentosa Cove. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: A Stock Trader’s Guide to the Start of ECB Interest Rate Hikes
title_cn: 欧洲央行加息开始的股票交易者指南
summary: European stock traders will need to add a further variable to their investment strategies this week: how rising interest rates will affect each corner of the market.

title: China Starts Prefabricated Power Hub for Data Centers, CCTV Says
title_cn: 央视报道中国启动数据中心预制电力中心
summary: China’s first prefabricated computing power hub has started operations, offering a faster and lower-cost way to build and supply electricity to data centers, according to a report from China Central Television.

title: Why an AI 'Death Spiral' Threatens the Internet
title_cn: 为什么人工智能“死亡螺旋”威胁互联网
summary: For decades, publishers depended on search engines to send readers to their websites, where advertising helped fund the creation of online content. But the rise of AI-powered search is changing that model. Researchers like Rand Fishkin say “zero-click” searches are increasingly keeping users inside platforms rather than sending them to publishers, while Rutgers professor Caitlin Petre warns that falling traffic could threaten the long-term economics of journalism and content creation. Yet some large publishers are adapting. People Inc. CEO Neil Vogel says his company has offset declining search traffic through brand diversification, social media distribution, licensing agreements, and paid partnerships with AI companies. The broader question is whether the internet can continue producing the content AI depends on if fewer creators are paid for their work.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Inside Apple’s Secret Meeting That Led It to Finally Take AI Seriously
title_cn: 苹果公司最终认真对待人工智能的秘密会议
summary: Also: What to expect at WWDC 2026.

title: Nvidia’s CEO Says New Vera Chip Will Use SK Hynix’s Memory Chips
title_cn: Nvidia首席执行官表示新的Vera芯片将使用SK Hynix的存储芯片
summary: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang said its new Vera central processing units will use SK Hynix Inc.’s memory chips as the two companies prepare to do more business in the coming year.

title: UK to Buy AI Chips From British Tech Firms, Telegraph Reports
title_cn: 据《每日电讯报》报道，英国将从英国科技公司购买人工智能芯片
summary: The UK will offer to buy artificial intelligence chips from technology companies in an effort to encourage them to stay in Britain, the Telegraph reported on Sunday.

title: SKorea’s Lee Nominates Tech Guru Han as PM to Lead AI Growth
title_cn: SKorea 的 Lee 提名技术大师 Han 为总理，领导人工智能的发展
summary: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung nominated SME and Startup Minister Han Seong-sook as prime minister, betting the tech industry veteran will help the country realize its artificial intelligence ambitions.

title: Venture Capital Trends to Watch in Africa
title_cn: 非洲值得关注的风险投资趋势
summary: As funding conditions tighten, investment into African startups held up in 2025. Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja spoke with venture capital investor Tokunboh Ishmael from Alitheia Capital for a view from investors on the ground. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Puts EVs on a Diet as Battery Boom Adds Bulk, CCTV Reports
title_cn: 据央视报道，随着电池热潮增加，中国对电动汽车进行节食
summary: China wants slimmer electric vehicles after years of bigger batteries and rising demand for space and features helped make passenger cars significantly larger and heavier, state broadcaster China Central Television reported on Sunday.

title: Trump AI Policy Adviser Krishnan Is Giving Up White House Role
title_cn: 特朗普人工智能政策顾问克里希南将放弃白宫角色
summary: Sriram Krishnan, a top White House adviser on artificial intelligence, is stepping down from the post.

title: Grindr Growing From Just Dating App to Politics, AI
title_cn: Grindr 从单纯的约会应用程序发展到政治、人工智能
summary: Grindr Inc. unveiled a handful of new app features and shared more details around its premium subscription tier as part of a larger effort to integrate artificial intelligence across its LGBTQ dating platform. The premium plan unlocks access to new AI features and deeper personalization, Grindr said Monday in a statement. The company is also investing further in AI-powered safety tools and in behind-the-scenes operations, Chief Executive Officer George Arison said in an interview with Bloomberg This Weekend. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin Drop Tests Retail Investor Strength
title_cn: 比特币下跌考验散户投资者实力
summary: For years, Wall Street has benefited from one of the most reliable forces in modern markets: a retail-trader army willing to buy almost anything. Friday offered a glimpse of what happens when several of those trades come under pressure at the same time. Artificial-intelligence stocks suffered their sharpest selloff in months, Bitcoin fell below $60,000 and bond yields surged as traders revived bets that the Federal Reserve’s next move could be a rate increase. Bloomberg Intelligence Senior Commodity Strategist Mike McGlone and Navy Federal Credit Union Chief Economist Heather Long joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Elon Musk to Attend ASML’s Private Tech Event to Discuss Terafab
title_cn: 埃隆·马斯克将出席 ASML 的私人技术活动讨论 Terafab
summary: Elon Musk will virtually attend a closed door technology conference run by ASML Holding NV to discuss his Terafab project, which the chip-equipment maker considers a “serious endeavor.”

title: Trump Signals Interest in US Owning Stakes in Top AI Labs
title_cn: 特朗普表示有兴趣在美国顶级人工智能实验室中持有股份
summary: President Donald Trump expressed interest in the US government holding equity stakes in leading artificial intelligence developers, saying that he planned to discuss the idea of a partnership with AI companies’ executives as soon as next week. Bloomberg Surveillance Co-Host and Chief Political Correspondent Annmarie Horden joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Susquehanna Is Building a Prediction Markets Business
title_cn: 萨斯奎哈纳为何要建立预测市场业务
summary: Creating an asset class for bets on anything.

title: Odd Lots: Why Susquehanna Builds Prediction Markets (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的事情：为什么萨斯奎哈纳建立预测市场（播客）
summary: Prediction markets that enable you to bet on pretty much everything are everywhere nowadays. But there’s still a big question over whether they can expand to include larger institutional investors like hedge funds. Part of the problem is that a lot of prediction market contracts are illiquid and trading volumes can sometimes be shallow. That’s where trading firm Susquehanna International Group comes in. In this episode, recorded live at New York’s City Winery, we talk to Jeremy Maletz, Susquehan

title: Jensen Huang Commands Seoul Stage With Night of Street Theater
title_cn: 黄仁勋以街头剧场之夜指挥首尔舞台
summary: For one Friday night, Hongdae wasn’t Seoul’s trendiest neighborhood. It was Jensen Huang’s stage.

title: Wall Street Week | AI-era Internet, Spaceport Investment, Bolivia’s Investability
title_cn: 华尔街周刊 | AI时代互联网、航天港投资、玻利维亚的可投资性
summary: This week, the dollar remains the world’s dominant currency, but economist Ken Rogoff thinks rising debt and geopolitical shifts are eroding its position as the world’s reserve currency. And, AI-powered search is reducing web traffic, forcing publishers to rethink how they attract audiences and generate revenue online. Will competition between the US and China to launch satellites create the next major infrastructure boom in the commercial space industry? Bolivia wants to benefit from foreign capital flows into Latin America and harness its mineral reserves, but political instability remains a significant challenge.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Discussion on the Iconoclast Dinner Experience and Its Cultural Impact
title_cn: 讨论反传统晚餐体验及其文化影响
summary: Esi Eggleston Bracey, former Unilever Global Chief Growth & Marketing Officer, shared her involvement with the Iconoclast dinner experience, highlighting its significance as a coveted event in the culinary world. She described how the event, founded by Dr. Leslie, has been developed over eleven years to identify and bring together top influencers and power players in culinary cuisine. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Market Sell-Off Analyzed Amid NASDAQ 100 Decline and Rising Yields
title_cn: 纳斯达克 100 指数下跌和收益率上升期间的市场抛售分析
summary: Jeremy Siegel, Professor Emeritus of Finance at the Wharton School, discussed the recent market sell-off during a live financial news segment. The conversation focused on the sharp decline in the NASDAQ 100, which was described as an AI-led rout coinciding with climbing yields. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The $200 Billion Data Center Transforming Louisiana
title_cn: 耗资 2000 亿美元的数据中心正在改变路易斯安那州
summary: Meta's Mark Zuckerberg wanted to build a massive data center. And Louisiana leaders wanted Meta to choose their state as its home. But making that happen took a lot of negotiation — and secrecy. Bloomberg reporter Riley Griffin takes host Sarah Holder inside the deal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Marvell Technology, Flex to Join S&P 500 Later This Month
title_cn: Marvell Technology 和 Flex 将于本月晚些时候加入标准普尔 500 指数
summary: Marvell Technology Inc. and Flex Ltd. will join the S&P 500 in the latest quarterly rebalance, S&P Dow Jones Indices said Friday.

title: DocuSign Shares Drop After Full-Year Guidance Disappoints Investors
title_cn: 全年指引令投资者失望后 DocuSign 股价下跌
summary: DocuSign's shares declined amid a broadly negative market day following the company's full-year guidance, which failed to excite investors. Allan Thygesen, CEO of DocuSign, discussed the company's AI-powered intelligent agreement management platform, highlighting strong adoption with 40,000 customers currently live on the platform. He speaks with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jobs Report Fuels Fed-Rate Hike Bets | The Close 6/5/2026
title_cn: 就业报告助长美联储加息押注收盘价 6/5/2026
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Edward Jones Head of Investment Strategy Mona Mahajan, Docusign CEO Allan Thygesen, Guggenheim Partners Senior Analyst of Retail & Commerce Simeon Siegel, Sperling Economics President Gene Sperling, Interactive Brokers Chief Strategist Steve Sosnick, Wharton School Professor Emeritus of Finance Jeremy Siegel, KPMG Chief Economist Diane Swank, DVx Ventures Co-Founder & Partner Karim Bousta, & Former Unilever Global Chief Growth & Marketing Officer Esi Eggleston Bracey. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Inks $30 Billion Computing Power Deal With Google
title_cn: SpaceX 与 Google 签署价值 300 亿美元的计算能力协议
summary: Bloomberg's Bailey Lipschultz breaks down a busy week in SpaceX news, as the aerospace company prepares for an IPO. SpaceX and Google entered into an agreement for cloud services where Google has agreed to pay SpaceX $920 million per month for computing, something Lipschultz says is indicative of the expansion of the scope of work SpaceX is looking to do.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apollo Wraps Up $35 Billion Debt to Buy AI Chips for Anthropic
title_cn: Apollo 偿还 350 亿美元债务，为 Anthropic 购买人工智能芯片
summary: Apollo Global Management Inc. and Blackstone Inc. have finalized a $35 billion financing package for Anthropic PBC to expand its AI infrastructure, marking the latest mega-deal in the artificial intelligence race.

title: Google-Tied Prepaid Energy Bonds See Flood of Muni Trader Demand
title_cn: 与谷歌挂钩的预付能源债券迎来了市政交易者的大量需求
summary: Google parent Alphabet Inc.’s municipal-bond market debut was met by a surge of investor interest.

title: BOE’s Bailey Warns of Possible AI Rationing on Capacity Limits
title_cn: 京东方贝利警告人工智能可能会限制产能
summary: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey suggested that artificial intelligence may need to be rationed because a lack of energy capacity will restrain the ability for every economic sector to deploy the new technology.

title: SpaceX Inks $30 Billion Computing Power Deal With Google
title_cn: SpaceX 与 Google 签署价值 300 亿美元的计算能力协议
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google has agreed to pay Elon Musk’s SpaceX $920 million a month for computing power as part of a cloud services deal that runs through mid-2029, its second such agreement with an AI competitor in a matter of weeks.

title: Tech Leaders Mull the Next Phase of AI as Top Labs Plan IPOs
title_cn: 顶级实验室计划首次公开募股，技术领导者正在考虑人工智能的下一阶段
summary: Executives and academics discuss the new unknowns emerging for AI

title: Bolivia Lowers Emergency Measures Threshold as Protests Grow
title_cn: 随着抗议活动的加剧，玻利维亚降低了紧急措施的门槛
summary: Bolivia’s lower house approved a bill easing requirements for state of emergency declarations as protests and road blockades demanding President Rodrigo Paz’s resignation disrupt transport routes, deepen shortages and strain the economy.

title: Trump Calls Settlement Fund ‘Great Idea’ Despite GOP Blowback
title_cn: 尽管共和党强烈反对，特朗普仍称和解基金是“好主意”
summary: President Donald Trump said he is interested in reviving his so-called anti-weaponization fund — and left the door open to steering some of its $1.8 billion toward rioters convicted of assaulting police in the Jan. 6 Capitol attacks — during a testy interview that ended with him abruptly walking out.

title: Armenians Vote For Parliament With Russian Ties in Focus
title_cn: 亚美尼亚投票选举议会，重点关注俄罗斯关系
summary: Armenians are voting in parliamentary elections that will determine whether Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan can secure a mandate for a sweeping reorientation of the country toward Europe even as tensions with Russia are on the rise.

title: Trump Says Fed Rate Increase Would Be Wrong, Again Calls for Cut
title_cn: 特朗普表示美联储加息是错误的，再次呼吁降息
summary: President Donald Trump said Federal Reserve policymakers would be wrong to raise interest rates after a blowout US jobs report, while insisting he doesn’t want to influence Kevin Warsh before he chairs his first Fed meeting.

title: Peru’s Economic Miracle Is At Stake as Voters Head to Polls
title_cn: 选民前往投票站，秘鲁的经济奇迹岌岌可危
summary: Peruvians are heading to the polls on Sunday in what is expected to be a tight presidential runoff, with the model behind one of Latin America’s most stable economies at stake.

title: Ukraine Says Drone Hit Nuclear Fuel Facility Near Chernobyl
title_cn: 乌克兰称无人机击中切尔诺贝利附近的核燃料设施
summary: Ukraine said Moscow’s forces struck a nuclear fuel storage facility near the mothballed Chernobyl power plant north of Kyiv, an incident that drew a sharp retort from the UN’s atomic watchdog.

title: Ukraine Targets St. Petersburg Before Zelenskyy Talks in UK
title_cn: 泽伦斯基在英国会谈之前乌克兰瞄准圣彼得堡
summary: Ukraine launched a drone barrage at St. Petersburg on Saturday, the final day of Russia’s premier investment forum, hours after President Vladimir Putin rejected a proposal for talks with Kyiv and ahead of a scheduled meeting between Volodymyr Zelenskyy and European leaders.

title: Xi Visits North Korea to Reassert Influence Over Emboldened Kim
title_cn: 习近平访问朝鲜重申对胆大妄为的金正恩的影响
summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping is heading to North Korea in a likely bid to reassert Beijing’s influence over an emboldened Kim Jong Un, a neighbor with a rapidly expanding nuclear arsenal and deepening alliance with Russia.

title: UK Deputy PM Says He Told Vance ‘You’re Wrong’ Over Nowak Case
title_cn: 英国副首相称他就诺瓦克案告诉万斯“你错了”
summary: Deputy Prime Minister David Lammy said he had spoken to JD Vance to contest comments the US vice president had made regarding the death of UK teenager Henry Nowak, which Vance blamed in part on Britain’s immigration policies.

title: China Boosts Patrols Near Taiwan on Japan-Philippines Talks
title_cn: 中国因日本与菲律宾会谈加强在台湾附近的巡逻
summary: China said it launched a special maritime operation east of Taiwan, ramping up its response to a recent agreement between Japan and the Philippines to negotiate maritime borders in the area and deepen defense cooperation.

title: South African President to Address Nation on Illegal Migration
title_cn: 南非总统将就非法移民问题向全国发表讲话
summary: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa will address the nation on Sunday on the government’s management of illegal migration and the recent surge in protests against foreign nationals, the presidency said.

title: US Intercepts Fresh Iranian Attacks as Peace Talks Stall
title_cn: 和平谈判陷入僵局，美国拦截伊朗新一轮袭击
summary: US and Iranian forces continued to trade fresh attacks, after a week that saw the worst flare-up in tensions since the shaky ceasefire started and little progress toward an interim peace deal.

title: US Floats Steering Frozen Iran Assets to Gulf Allies for Repairs
title_cn: 美国将冻结的伊朗资产转交给海湾盟国进行维修
summary: The Trump administration is seeking to steer Iranian assets toward helping US allies in the Persian Gulf rebuild from damage inflicted by Tehran, and to repair any future destruction.

title: Illinois Joins Ohio in Ordering Pause on Data Center Tax Credits
title_cn: 伊利诺伊州与俄亥俄州一起下令暂停数据中心税收抵免
summary: Governor JB Pritzker issued an order pausing state tax incentives for data centers in Illinois after the state legislature stalled his plan to keep data-center energy costs from affecting local residents’ bills.

title: Senegal’s Sonko Reelected Pastef Chief as Rift With Faye Grows
title_cn: 塞内加尔桑科再次当选巴斯夫酋长，与费耶的裂痕加剧
summary: Ousmane Sonko was reelected president of Senegal’s majority Pastef party on Saturday, cementing his position as the dominant figure within the country’s governing movement at a time of escalating tensions with rival President Bassirou Diomaye Faye.

title: Trump Speaks on Air Force One to Wisconsin
title_cn: 特朗普乘坐空军一号前往威斯康星州发表讲话
summary:
President Trump announced that top artificial intelligence leaders will visit the White House next week to discuss how the technology can benefit Americans.

Speaking to reporters aboard Air Force One en route to Wisconsin on Friday, the President shared plans for the upcoming meeting following questions from Bloomberg’s Annmarie Hordern. During the press pool exchange, Hordern also questioned Trump regarding Senator Bernie Sanders and the rising costs of basketball game tickets (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Plans to Tap Bolivia’s Vast Mineral Riches Hit by Mass Unrest
title_cn: 计划开采玻利维亚因大规模骚乱而蕴藏的丰富矿产资源
summary: Mass unrest across Bolivia is stalling the new government’s plans to tap the nation’s vast mineral wealth using foreign capital.

title: Trump Speaks on Sanders Economic Policies
title_cn: 特朗普谈桑德斯经济政策
summary: Speaking to reporters aboard Air Force One en route to Wisconsin on Friday, President Trump spoke on Senator Bernie Sanders and their similarities on economic policies. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump on Rising Cost of Basketball Games Tickets
title_cn: 特朗普谈篮球比赛门票价格上涨
summary: Speaking to reporters aboard Air Force One en route to Wisconsin on Friday, President Trump responds to concerns over the rising costs of basketball game tickets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Announces AI Leaders White House Visit
title_cn: 特朗普宣布人工智能领导人访问白宫
summary:
Speaking to reporters aboard Air Force One en route to Wisconsin on Friday, President Trump announced that top artificial intelligence leaders will visit the White House next week to discuss how the technology can benefit Americans.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Merz Warns of Far-Right ‘Big Bang’ in Eastern German Elections
title_cn: 默茨警告东德选举中极右翼“大爆炸”
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz warned of a major shakeup in two key eastern German state elections in September where the Alternative for Germany leads in the polls, urging the political center to work together to counter the far-right party.

title: Lithuanian Coalition Collapses After Clash Over Defense Plans
title_cn: 立陶宛联军因防御计划发生冲突而崩溃
summary: Lithuania’s Social Democrats have moved to dissolve their ruling coalition with junior partner Dawn of Nemunas following a clash over defense policy.

title: The Albanian Island at the Center of Anger Over Kushner’s Resort Plans
title_cn: 阿尔巴尼亚岛成为库什纳度假村计划愤怒的中心
summary: The ride from the Albanian mainland to the island of Sazan takes just 20 minutes in a speedboat.

title: Xi’s Confidant Cai Expands Influence With Party School Head Post
title_cn: 习近平心腹蔡出任党校校长扩大影响力
summary: China’s fifth-most senior leader has taken over leadership of the Communist Party’s top training academy, marking the latest expansion of responsibilities for one of President Xi Jinping’s trusted aides.

title: ‘What Will Happen to Us?’ Southern Lebanese Christians Ask
title_cn: 黎巴嫩南部基督徒问道：“我们会发生什么？”
summary: Rita Elias and her family fled southern Lebanon to shelter with relatives in Beirut during the last war between Hezbollah and Israel in 2024, returning only after a truce. This time, she stayed to protect her property, her husband’s trucking business and their tobacco farm.

title: Iceland Debates Benefits of Euro Entry as Vote on EU Talks Nears
title_cn: 随着欧盟谈判投票临近，冰岛讨论加入欧元区的好处
summary: Iceland’s upcoming referendum on talks with the European Union has also sparked a debate over whether the country should give up its currency.

title: Swiss Army’s Push to Keep Soldiers Is Going to the Ballot Box
title_cn: 瑞士军队保留士兵的努力即将进入投票箱
summary: Switzerland’s struggle to keep its military staffed at a time of global geopolitical tensions is about to play out with a national vote on the terms of conscription.

title: Burnham Looks Toward Starmer Showdown After Reform UK Stumbles
title_cn: 英国改革失败后，伯纳姆期待斯塔默摊牌
summary: Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham was indignant when a broadcaster challenged him this week over his refusal to spell out wider ambitions for higher office beyond winning the special election he’s fighting.
